common.target_dead_note: You can't send resources to an eliminated player.

troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting
troubleshooting.copied_to_clipboard: Info copied to the clipboard! Feel free to share it on our Discord if you need help.
troubleshooting.chromium_tip: OpenFront runs best on Chromium-based browsers.
troubleshooting.hardware_acceleration_tip: Make sure hardware acceleration is enabled in your browser settings for optimal performance.
troubleshooting.gpu_tip: Verify that this is the dedicated GPU, if one is available.
troubleshooting.power_saving_tip: Make sure that your browser is not set to power saving mode.

help_modal.action_esc: Closes menu. Cancels unit build preview.
help_modal.action_attack_altclick: Attack (when left click is set to open menu)
help_modal.ui_leaderboard_desc: Shows the top players of the game and their names, % owned land, gold and troops. Using Show All shows all players in the game. If you don't want to see the leaderboard, click Hide.
help_modal.ui_control_desc: The control panel contains the following elements:
help_modal.ui_gold: Gold - The amount of gold you have and the rate at which you gain it.
help_modal.ui_attack_ratio: Attack ratio - The amount of troops that will be used when you attack. You can adjust the attack ratio using the slider. Having more attacking troops than defending troops will make you lose fewer troops in the attack, while having less will increase the damage dealt to your attacking troops. The effect doesn't go beyond ratios of 2:1.
help_modal.ui_events_desc: The Event panel displays the latest events, requests and Quick Chat messages. Some examples are:
help_modal.ui_events_alliance: Alliance - Alliance requests can be accepted or rejected. Allies can share resources and troops, but can't attack each other. Clicking Focus moves the view to the player who sent the request.
help_modal.ui_events_attack: Attacks - Incoming attacks and your outgoing attacks are shown. Click the message to center the view on the attack, nuke or Boat (transport ship). You can retreat troops by clicking the red X button. This will cost the lives of 25% of your attacking troops. If you retrieve a Boat attack, the boat returns to its starting point and will attack there if the land has been captured since. Nukes can't be retreated once launched.
help_modal.ui_events_quickchat: Quick Chat - You can see sent and received chat messages here. Send a message to a player by clicking the Quick Chat icon in their Info menu.
help_modal.ui_options_desc: The following elements can be found inside:
help_modal.ui_playeroverlay_desc: When you hover over a country, the Player info overlay appears. It shows the player type (Human, Nation, or Tribe), a Nation's attitude toward you (Hostile to Friendly), defending troops, gold, and the number of Warships and buildings they have.
help_modal.option_pause: Pause/Unpause the game - Unavailable in public games.
help_modal.option_speed: Speed - Adjust the game speed. Unavailable in public games.
help_modal.option_timer: Timer - Time passed since the start of the game.
help_modal.option_settings: Settings - Open the settings menu. Inside you can toggle things like Alternate view, Emojis, Dark Mode, Hidden names, action on left click and more.
help_modal.radial_desc: Right clicking (or touch on mobile) opens the Radial menu. Right click outside it to close it. From the menu you can:
help_modal.radial_boat: Send a Boat (transport ship) to attack at the selected location. Only available if you have access to water.
help_modal.radial_donate_troops: Donate troops equivalent to your attack ratio slider percentage to the ally you opened the radial menu on.
help_modal.radial_donate_gold: Opens the gold donation slider menu so you can quickly send allies gold.
help_modal.info_enemy_desc: Contains information such as the selected player's name, gold, troops, stopped trading with you, nukes sent to you, and if the player is a traitor. Stopped trading means you won't receive gold from them and they won't sent you gold via trade ships. Manually (if the player clicked "Stop trading", which lasts until you both click "Start trading") or automatically (if you betrayed your alliance, which lasts until you become allies again or after 5 minutes). Traitor displays Yes for 30 seconds when the player betrayed and attacked a player who was in an alliance with them. The icons below represent the following interactions:
help_modal.info_chat: Send a quick chat message to the player. Select a Category, a Phrase, and if the phrase contains [P1] select a Player name to replace it with. Hit Send.
help_modal.info_target: Place a target mark on the player, marking it for all allies, used to coordinate attacks.
help_modal.info_alliance: Send an alliance request to the player. Allies can share resources and troops, but can't attack each other.
help_modal.info_emoji: Send an emoji to the player.
help_modal.info_trade: Use "Stop trading" to stop giving the player gold and receiving their gold via trade ships. If you both click "Start trading" it will start again.
help_modal.info_ally_desc: When you ally with a player, the following new icons become available:
help_modal.ally_betray: Betray your ally, ending the alliance, halting trade, and weakening your defense. Trading between you is paused for 5 minutes (or until you become allies again) and others may stop trading too. And unless the other player was a traitor themselves, you'll be marked a traitor for 30 seconds. During this time an icon will be above your name and you will have a 50% defense debuff. Tribes are less likely to ally with you and players will think twice before doing so.
help_modal.ally_donate: Donate some of your troops to your ally. Used when they're low on troops and are being attacked, or when they need that extra power to crush an enemy.
help_modal.ally_donate_gold: Donate some of your gold to your ally. Used when they're low on gold and need it for buildings, or when your team member is saving for that MIRV.
help_modal.build_menu_desc: Build these or see how many of each you already build:
help_modal.build_city_desc: Increases your max population. Useful when you can't expand your territory or you're about to hit your population limit.
help_modal.build_factory_desc: Automatically builds railroads to nearby cities, ports and other factories, and can also link up with friendly neighbors. Trains spawn regularly and give you a fixed amount of gold for each building they visit along the route, with extra gold for visiting your neighbors' buildings.
help_modal.build_defense_desc: Increases defenses around nearby borders, which show a checkered pattern. Attacks from enemies are slower and have more casualties.
help_modal.build_port_desc: Can only be built near water. Allows building Warships. Automatically sends trade ships between ports of your country and other countries (except when trade is stopped), giving gold to both sides. Trade with a player stops automatically when you attack or are attacked by a player. It resumes after 5 minutes or if you become allies. You can manually toggle trading with "Stop trading" or "Start trading".
help_modal.build_warship_desc: Patrols in an area, capturing enemy trade ships and destroying their Boats (transport ships) and Warships. Spawns from the nearest Port and patrols the area you first clicked to build it. You can control Warships by attack-clicking on them (see action Attack under Hotkeys) and then attack-clicking the new area you want them to move to.
help_modal.build_sam_desc: Can intercept enemy missiles in its 100 pixel range. The SAM has a 7.5 second cooldown.
help_modal.build_atom_desc: Small explosive bomb that destroys territory, buildings, ships and boats. Spawns from the nearest Missile Silo and lands in the area you first clicked to build it.
help_modal.build_hydrogen_desc: Large explosive bomb. Spawns from the nearest Missile Silo and lands in the area you first clicked to build it.
help_modal.build_mirv_desc: The most powerful bomb in the game. Splits up into smaller bombs that will cover a huge range of territory. Only damages the player that you first clicked on to build it. Spawns from the nearest Missile Silo and lands in the area you first clicked to build it.
help_modal.troubleshooting_desc: If you experience performance issues, crashes, or other problems while playing OpenFront, please visit our Troubleshooting page for help diagnosing and fixing common issues:
help_modal.icon_desc: Examples of some of the ingame icons you will encounter and what they mean:
help_modal.icon_crown: Crown - Number 1. This is the top player in the leaderboard.
help_modal.icon_traitor: Broken shield - Traitor. This player attacked an ally.
help_modal.icon_ally: Handshake - Ally. This player is your ally.
help_modal.icon_embargo: Dollar stop sign - Embargo. This player has stopped trading with you automatically or manually.
help_modal.icon_request: Envelope - Alliance request. This player has sent you an alliance request.
help_modal.exit_confirmation: Are you sure you want to exit the game?

single_modal.max_timer_invalid: Please enter a valid max timer value (1-120 minutes)

account_modal.sign_in_desc: Sign in to save your stats and progress

leaderboard_modal.loss_score_tooltip: Weighted losses based on clan participation and match difficulty

game_info_modal.no_winner: This game ended with no winner (or a Nation won)

private_lobby.not_found: Lobby not found. Please check the ID and try again.
private_lobby.error: An error occurred. Please try again or contact support.

private_lobby.version_mismatch: This game was created with a different version. Cannot join.

public_lobby.title: Waiting for Game Start...
public_lobby.join_timeout: You didn't enter the game in time.

username.too_short: Username must be at least {min} characters long.
username.invalid_chars: Username can only contain letters, numbers, spaces, and underscores.
username.tag_too_short: Clan tag must be 2-5 alphanumeric characters.
username.tag_invalid_chars: Clan tag can only contain letters and numbers.

host_modal.title: Create Private Lobby
host_modal.leave_confirmation: Are you sure you want to leave the lobby?

user_setting.title: Settings
user_setting.dark_mode_desc: Toggle the site’s appearance between light and dark themes
user_setting.emojis_desc: Toggle whether emojis are shown in game
user_setting.alert_frame_desc: Toggle the alert frame. When enabled, the frame will be displayed when you are betrayed or attacked over land.
user_setting.special_effects_desc: Toggle special effects. Deactivate to improve performances
user_setting.cursor_cost_label_desc: Show a cost pill under the build cursor icon
user_setting.anonymous_names_desc: Hide real player names with random ones on your screen.
user_setting.lobby_id_visibility_desc: Hide Lobby ID in private lobby creation
user_setting.left_click_desc: When ON, left-click opens menu and sword button attacks. When OFF, left-click attacks directly.
user_setting.attack_ratio_desc: What percentage of your troops to send in an attack (1–100%)
user_setting.territory_patterns_desc: Choose whether to display territory skin designs in game
user_setting.attacking_troops_overlay_desc: Show attacker vs defender troop counts on active front lines.
user_setting.performance_overlay_desc: Toggle the performance overlay. When enabled, the performance overlay will be displayed. Press shift-D during game to toggle.
user_setting.easter_writing_speed_desc: Adjust how fast you pretend to code (x1–x100)
user_setting.easter_bug_count_desc: How many bugs you're okay with (0–1000, emotionally)
user_setting.build_city_desc: Build a City under your cursor.
user_setting.build_factory_desc: Build a Factory under your cursor.
user_setting.build_defense_post_desc: Build a Defense Post under your cursor.
user_setting.build_port_desc: Build a Port under your cursor.
user_setting.build_warship_desc: Build a Warship under your cursor.
user_setting.build_missile_silo_desc: Build a Missile Silo under your cursor.
user_setting.build_sam_launcher_desc: Build a SAM Launcher under your cursor.
user_setting.build_atom_bomb_desc: Build an Atom Bomb under your cursor.
user_setting.build_hydrogen_bomb_desc: Build a Hydrogen Bomb under your cursor.
user_setting.build_mirv_desc: Build a MIRV under your cursor.
user_setting.build_menu_modifier_desc: Hold this key while clicking to open the build menu.
user_setting.emoji_menu_modifier_desc: Hold this key while clicking to open the emoji menu.
user_setting.pause_game_desc: Pause or resume the game (single player and custom games for host).
user_setting.game_speed_up_desc: Cycle to next game speed (0.5, 1, 2, max). Single player only.
user_setting.game_speed_down_desc: Cycle to previous game speed. Single player only.
user_setting.attack_ratio_increment_desc: How much the attack ratio keybinds change per press/scroll.
user_setting.boat_attack_desc: Send a boat attack to the tile under your cursor.
user_setting.ground_attack_desc: Send a ground attack to the tile under your cursor.
user_setting.move_left_desc: Move the camera to the left
user_setting.move_right_desc: Move the camera to the right
user_setting.keybind_conflict_error: The key {key} is already bound to another action.
